headlines.text: Pakistan PM says US and Iran have agreed on final text of peace deal; signing location being negotiated
SpaceX closes first day of trading up 19% at $160.95, completing the largest IPO in history at $1.77T valuation
FIFA World Cup 2026 Day 3: Brazil vs. Morocco and Haiti vs. Scotland kick off today across US venues
Olivia Rodrigo's third album 'You Seem Pretty Sad for a Girl So in Love' drops Friday, sets 2026 Spotify streaming record
Spielberg's 'Disclosure Day' opens in theaters with 90% on Rotten Tomatoes, his best-reviewed film in years
Judge extends block on Trump administration's billion-dollar 'anti-weaponization' fund, citing lack of trust
DOJ clears Paramount-Warner Bros. Discovery merger, finding no threat to US competition
Princess of Wales joins Royal Family at Peter Phillips' wedding ceremony
US drones shoot down Iranian drones targeting ships in Strait of Hormuz for second consecutive night
Elon Musk becomes world's first trillionaire on paper as SpaceX IPO vaults his net worth past $1 trillion

breaking.text: Pakistan PM confirms US-Iran peace deal text is finalized; both sides now negotiating where to sign it

stories.hed: US and Iran Agree on Peace Deal Text; Signing Location the Only Thing Left to Fight About
stories.dek: After 106 days of missiles, drones, and warships playing bumper cars in the Strait of Hormuz, Pakistan's Prime Minister announced the US and Iran have agreed on the final wording of a peace deal. The sticking point now is apparently where to sign it, which is diplomacy's version of arguing over the restaurant.

stories.hed: FIFA World Cup 2026 Day 3: Brazil, Morocco, Haiti, Scotland All Take the Pitch Today
stories.dek: The World Cup's record 48-team tournament rolls into its third day with four matches spread across US venues. Brazil faces Morocco in New Jersey while Haiti makes its World Cup debut against Scotland in Foxborough.

stories.hed: Federal Judge Extends Block on Trump's 'Anti-Weaponization' Fund, Says She Doesn't Trust the Administration
stories.dek: A federal judge extended her order blocking Trump's billion-dollar anti-weaponization fund, stating plainly that she does not trust the administration to comply. It's rare for a judicial opinion to include what amounts to a Yelp review of an entire branch of government.

stories.hed: DOJ Approves Paramount-Warner Bros. Discovery Merger, Creating Yet Another Media Mega-Blob
stories.dek: The Department of Justice signed off on the merger between Paramount Skydance and Warner Bros. Discovery, concluding it poses no threat to competition. Consumers who enjoy having dozens of streaming passwords are encouraged to grieve privately.

stories.hed: Elon Musk Is Now Technically the World's First Trillionaire — On Paper, Anyway
stories.dek: SpaceX's historic IPO closing at $160.95 per share pushed Elon Musk's net worth past $1 trillion for the first time in history, making him the world's first trillionaire on paper. Whether he actually feels richer than yesterday while posting at 3am about imaginary enemies is a matter for philosophers.

markets.context: Markets rose Friday as SpaceX's record-breaking IPO debut and optimism over a US-Iran peace deal lifted sentiment, while oil prices fell sharply on ceasefire hopes.

gas.note: Gas is down from last week's $4.28 — apparently the threat of peace is already hitting Big Oil where it hurts.

popCulture.hed: Olivia Rodrigo Drops Album 'You Seem Pretty Sad for a Girl So in Love,' Breaks 2026 Spotify Record on Day One
popCulture.dek: Rodrigo's third album arrived Friday featuring a Robert Smith of The Cure collaboration and a full emotional autopsy of a doomed romance. It became the most-streamed album by a female artist in a single day on Spotify in 2026, proving that heartbreak is still extremely good for business.

genZ.term: Charli XCX Rock Music Glitch Format
genZ.definition: Charli XCX's May drop 'Rock Music' spawned a TikTok format built entirely around a deliberate vocal glitch mid-track — creators use the malfunction as the comedic or emotional pivot point of their videos. It has been flooding FYPs all of June as the format gets remixed into everything from breakup confessions to World Cup reactions.
genZ.usage: POV: you're Iran and you've agreed to a peace deal text but now you have to pick a country to sign it in [glitch sound] Switzerland??? [freeze frame chaos]

tldr: The US and Iran agreed on peace deal language Saturday, sending oil prices down and stocks up on the same day SpaceX completed the largest IPO in history and Olivia Rodrigo broke Spotify records — a genuinely absurd amount of news for one weekend. The FIFA World Cup is also happening, because apparently the universe decided June 2026 needed to go completely unhinged.
